Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Philip Tam.
Attorney Tony Ruch, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Shameka Jones is not present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of DEC-5-2011 remains on calendar.
